title: Evaluation of the Networks for School Improvement Initiative—How Network Hubs Develop and Support Continuous Improvement Networks: Final Report
summary_en: In this report, the authors examine how intermediary organizations developed and supported 25 networks of schools using continuous improvement approaches to improve educational outcomes for students who are Black, Latino, or experiencing poverty.
title_cn: 兰德公司发布《学校改进网络举措评估：网络中心如何发展并支持持续改进网络》最终报告

title: Evaluation of the Networks for School Improvement Initiative—How Network Hubs Develop and Support Continuous Improvement Networks: Data Sources and Methodology
summary_en: The authors review the data and methods used to examine how intermediaries developed and supported 25 school networks using continuous improvement approaches to improve educational outcomes for students who are Black, Latino, or experiencing poverty.
title_cn: 兰德公司发布《学校改进网络倡议评估：网络中心如何开发并支持持续改进网络：数据来源与方法论》技术报告

title: Evaluation of Networks for School Improvement: Impacts, Implementation, and Lessons for Network-Based Continuous Improvement
summary_en: This brief summarizes the results of a network-based continuous improvement initiative to increase the proportion of students who are Black, Latino, or experiencing poverty and are on track for high school graduation and college enrollment.
title_cn: 学校改进网络评估：基于网络的持续改进的影响、实施情况及经验教训

title: Simpler Is Better for Autograders: Toward Cost-Effective LLM Evaluations for Open-Ended Tasks
summary_en: A simple rubric-based autograder outperformed more-complex large language model grading methods across benchmarks, often matching or beating nonexpert human graders while cutting down evaluation time and cost.
title_cn: 兰德公司研究表明：自动评分器精简设计更具优势 开放式任务大语言模型评估可实现更高成本效益

title: A Formal Model of How Artificial Intelligence Erodes Human Agency
summary_en: In this report, the authors draw on social choice theory to develop a formal model of how AI erodes collective human agency; they also model decisionmaking to identify the point beyond which this erosion could become irreversible.
title_cn: 兰德公司发布《人工智能侵蚀人类能动性的正式模型》研究报告
